mapper.sql: id, session_id, user_id, project_name, started_at, ended_at, duration_seconds, total_tokens, tool_read_count, tool_edit_count, tool_bash_count, tool_grep_count, created_stime, modified_stime, is_del
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(started_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') AS hour, COALESCE(SUM(total_tokens), 0) AS tokens FROM metrics_sessions WHERE DATE(started_at) = #{date} AND is_del = 0 GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

SELECT project_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS sessions, SUM(total_tokens) AS tokens FROM metrics_sessions WHERE DATE(started_at) = #{date} AND is_del = 0 GROUP BY project_name ORDER BY sessions DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.user_id AS userId, u.username AS userName, u.team, COUNT(*) AS sessions, SUM(s.total_tokens) AS tokens, AVG(s.duration_seconds) AS avgDuration FROM metrics_sessions s LEFT JOIN metrics_users u ON s.user_id = u.user_id AND u.is_del = 0 WHERE DATE(s.started_at) = #{date} AND s.is_del = 0 GROUP BY s.user_id, u.username, u.team ORDER BY sessions DESC LIMIT #{limit}
